Line Status Register

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x1c
Size:
0x4
Source:
reg_spec_ref.rdl

Description

Contains UART status. Software write is blocked.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:7] - - - -
[6] TEMT r 0x1 Transmitter Empty
[5] THRE r 0x1 THR Empty
[4] BI r 0x0 Break Indicator
[3] FE r 0x0 Framing Error
[2] PE r 0x0 Parity Error
[1] OE r 0x0 Overrun Error
[0] DR r 0x0 Data Ready

Field Descriptions

TEMT - Transmitter Empty

1 when shift register and THR are empty.

THRE - THR Empty

1 when transmitter is ready for next byte.

DR - Data Ready

Set on byte receive, cleared on RBR read.
